name: Subsurface Surveyor
flavor_text: "The first rule of the descent: count your steps. The second rule: count them again when nothing adds up."

validation_errors: Non-creature card has power and/or toughness set
Card has power/toughness but 'Creature' is not in card_types

design_notes: Blue common vanilla at CMC 1. A 1/2 for {U} is a clean, on-rate defensive body — comparable to Merfolk of the Pearl Trident's 1/1 but shifted to favor toughness, which fits blue's defensive common creature profile. P+T = 3 = CMC(1)+2, well within the CMC+3 budget. The Scout type fits the dungeon-exploration theme. No abilities keeps it NWO-clean at common.
